title: Approve history strategy before public visibility change
description: Current-tree cleanup is safe across Eve Horizon and in-scope satellite repos, but pre-cleanup git history still contains legacy Beads and private operational docs/references in one or more repositories. Before making private repos public or declaring public histories final, explicitly approve either a history rewrite/filtering strategy or accepting the existing history risk.
close_reason: Resolved by choosing and starting the clean-history public repository path under eve-horizon/eve-horizon while retaining the legacy source history privately.

title: Clarify OSS source checkout release ownership
description: After switching this checkout to the public eve-horizon/eve-horizon repo, ./bin/eh status and configure still imply non-staging owners should avoid release artifact publishing. In the OSS model the source repo may publish release artifacts, while staging rollout stays in the private deployment instance repo.
close_reason: Updated status/configure wording to separate source artifact publishing from staging ownership.

title: Keep OSS CI publish-only
description: Ensure eve-horizon/eve-horizon release workflows publish artifacts only and never trigger a hosted staging deployment. Deployment to staging must be explicit from the private deployment instance repo.
close_reason: OSS source release workflow and dev guidance now state that release tags publish artifacts only; hosted rollouts are explicit from deployment instance repos.

title: Coordinate fullstack example OSS cleanup
description: The fullstack example checkout was on a dirty feature branch during OSS cleanup, so it was not edited. Coordinate that branch, then add/verify root MIT license and rerun the internal-reference scan before public visibility changes.
close_reason: Fullstack example remote main cleaned from a temporary worktree in commit a56ccc4 without touching local pack-lock changes.

title: Coordinate starter template OSS cleanup
description: The starter template checkout had unrelated dirty files during OSS cleanup, so it was not edited. Coordinate or clear the local dirty state, then add/verify root MIT license and rerun the internal-reference scan before public visibility changes.
close_reason: Starter remote main cleaned from a temporary worktree in commit cc5a02a without touching local dirty port changes.

title: Patch satellite repos for MIT/public-safe metadata
description: For clean satellite working trees, add missing MIT license/governance and remove private references. Repos with unrelated dirty work require coordination before edits. Track status in the OSS cleanup scorecard.
close_reason: All in-scope satellite and remote-only repos were cleaned or verified; remaining work is history/visibility approval, not current-tree patching.

title: Run secret and internal-reference scans before public flip
description: Run rg, gitleaks, and trufflehog over working tree and full history where available. Record pass/fail and unavailable tools in docs/reports/2026-06-25-oss-cleanup-scorecard.md. Stop for real secrets or any required history rewrite approval.
close_reason: Current-tree rg scans completed across Eve Horizon and in-scope repos; gitleaks/trufflehog unavailable locally and recorded in scorecard; history strategy remains tracked separately.

title: Verify Beads clean baseline from a fresh clone
description: After the sanitized Beads baseline is committed, run bd doctor and bd ready locally, then test bootstrap/ready from a fresh clone or temporary worktree. Confirm no legacy issue history or private sync remote is required.
close_reason: Sanitized Beads baseline verified from fresh clone of pushed main.

title: Finish public-tree OSS cleanup
description: Remove or genericize remaining public-tree private deployment references, update scorecard evidence, and keep reusable platform docs intact. Relocate useful private ops context to the private deployment instance repo when its working tree is safe to touch.
close_reason: Current public tree sanitized, private context relocated and pushed, scorecard updated.

title: Open-source Eve Horizon under MIT
description: Release the Eve Horizon platform and in-scope satellite repos as public, MIT-licensed, self-hostable projects. Keep private deployment-instance operations outside the public source tree. Current control surface: docs/plans/2026-06-18-open-sourcing-eve-horizon-plan.md and docs/reports/2026-06-25-oss-cleanup-scorecard.md.
close_reason: OSS cleanup completed with sanitized current trees, private infra relocation, clean Beads baseline, and clean-history public Eve Horizon repository path approved.
